metadata.description: Astra marketplace for Claude Code: lead-guided engineering workflow (`crew`), Wiggin-Loop methodology layer (`loop`), and cortex memory-service bridge (`cortex`). Central registry — plugins live in their own repos.

plugins.name: crew
plugins.description: Lead-guided engineering workflow plugin for Claude Code with bounded subagents, quality gates, and inspectable handoffs

plugins.name: loop
plugins.description: Wiggin-Loop methodology layer for Claude Code with HARD RULE blocks, slice scaffold, and phase-gate runner

plugins.name: cortex
plugins.description: Slash commands (/recall, /remember) + PreCompact and SessionEnd hooks bridging Claude Code to the local cortex memory service. Thin UX layer on top of the cortex MCP server.
